creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I tried to search for the C functions in question, sepcificially
get_dh512(). It isn't present and should be at least declared in
openssl/dh.h.

I searched a while the internet and stumbled into this
explanation, dated to the year 2008 occuring on Linux. They report the
same issue:

http://www.linuxquestions.org/questions/linux-software-2/nagios-nrpe-undefined-reference-to-%60get_dh512%27-613815/

Obviously, it has to do with an incompatible OpenSSH version the port
net-mgmt/nrpe expects.

I have not found yet a solution to fix this, since it seems to be a
problem in the base system, not the port itself.

Oliver
